
# Results

## Challenges
{{< include /qc/excerpts/edited/Personal_challenges.qmd >}}

## Facilitators
{{< include /qc/excerpts/edited/Process_faciliatators.qmd >}}
{{< include /qc/excerpts/edited/Social_facilitators.qmd >}}
{{< include /qc/excerpts/edited/Personal_attitudes.qmd >}}
{{< include /qc/excerpts/edited/Goal_setting.qmd >}}
{{< include /qc/excerpts/edited/Coercion.qmd >}}

## Outcomes
{{< include /qc/excerpts/edited/Process_outcomes.qmd >}}
{{< include /qc/excerpts/edited/Documentary_outcomes.qmd >}}
{{< include /qc/excerpts/edited/Epistemic_outcomes.qmd >}}
